visual_description: A wide, low-angle shot shows a large, snow-covered building at night, illuminated by a few bright lights against a dark, foggy sky. Two small, indistinct figures walk across the snow-covered ground in the foreground. The building has a dark, imposing appearance with multiple windows and a steep, snow-laden roof.
audio_description: A low, ominous, and sustained musical tone plays, creating a suspenseful and eerie atmosphere.
